content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於6月30日21:05進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年7月14日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了「課題紀錄」高階課題40級獎勵的「課題禮匣」獎勵無法領取，以及高階/中階/初階的「升格匣子」和「技能補給」使用後無法正常領取的問題。
● 調整了「顱庭輓歌·限時紀行」第4-8個禮包的可領取時間，現在這些禮包在購買紀行後可以更早被領取。
● 修復了未解鎖課題紀錄時，錯誤顯示雙倍經驗角標的問題。
● 修復了「相位對弈」中「不存在之地」名稱描述錯誤的問題。
● 修復了部分語言設置下，共鳴滾動條文本顯示不完全的問題。
● 優化了語言設置為英語時的以下文本表述問題：
    ○ 優化了部分角色的技能描述標點符號。

V2.2.3.1 Online Maintenance Notice

Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on June 30 at 21:05(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on July 14 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed an issue where the "Curriculum Honor" reward for completing Advanced Topics level 40 in "Curriculum" could not be claimed, as well as issues where "Edify Box" and "Skill Supply" for Advanced/Intermediate/Basic tiers could not be claimed properly after use.  
● Adjusted the claim timing for packages 4 through 8 of the "Ossuary Antiphon: Time-Limited Journey" event, allowing them to be claimed earlier after purchasing the journey.  
● Fixed an issue where the Double EXP icon was incorrectly displayed when the curriculum was not unlocked.  
● Fixed a naming description error for "The Land of Nonexistence" within "Traphase."  
● Fixed an issue where Resonance scrollbar text was not fully displayed under certain language settings.  
● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
   ○ Optimized punctuation in the skill descriptions of some characters.
